component.name: Cloud Drive Sync
component.summary: Bidirectional cloud file sync for Linux

description.p: Cloud Drive Sync provides bidirectional file synchronization between your Linux desktop and cloud storage providers including Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, Nextcloud, and Box.

ul.li: Multi-account support with multiple cloud providers
Bidirectional, upload-only, or download-only sync modes
Bandwidth throttling and concurrent transfer control
System tray integration with status indicators
Selective sync with ignore patterns and advanced rules
